title: vanda ampullacea subsp. moulmeinensis
intro: Vanda ampullacea subsp. moulmeinensis, also known as the Moulmein Vanda, is a rare species of orchid native to Myanmar and southern China. As an orchid, it has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Vanda ampullacea subsp. moulmeinensis include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing its flowers or leaves in hot water to create a tea, which is then consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
